Oxydendrum arboreum, commonly known as the Sourwood tree, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America. The health benefits of Oxydendrum arboreum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as sore throats and fever.
